title: phlogacanthus paniculatus
intro: Phlogacanthus paniculatus, also known as Indian mint or Thai mint, is a perennial plant that belongs to the family Acanthaceae, commonly found in the tropical regions of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Phlogacanthus paniculatus include relief from fever, cough, cold, and respiratory issues, as well as its use in treating skin conditions and wounds. In traditional herbal medicine, Phlogacanthus paniculatus is prepared as a decoction or infusion by boiling its leaves in water to create a tea that is used to treat various ailments.
